name: Statikete
source: Starfinder #19: Fate of the Fifth pg. 57
senses: blindsense (electromagnetism) 60 ft., darkvision 60 ft., low-light vision;
melee: bite +26 (8d6+20 E & P; critical energy discharge)

special_abilities.name: Electricity Absorption (Ex)
special_abilities.description: Whenever a statikete's electricity immunity prevents it from taking damage, it regains 1 Resolve Point.

special_abilities.name: Electrical Feeder (Ex)
special_abilities.description: A statikete reduced to 0 Resolve Points loses access to its shock blast attack, and its bite attack deals half damage and deals only piercing damage.

special_abilities.name: Energy Discharge (Ex)
special_abilities.description:
When a statikete scores a critical hit with its bite attack, the target and all technological objects the target holds or carries are affected as if as by the
discharge
spell. If any target is affected by this effect, the statikete regains 1 Resolve Point.

special_abilities.name: Shock Blast (Ex)
special_abilities.description: A statikete can spend 1 Resolve Point to fire its shock blast as an attack with a range increment of 120 feet.

description:
Lurking in the shadows of space, especially among debris such as the asteroids of the Diaspora, statiketes are lamprey-like creatures that drain electricity and use it to fire powerful shock blasts at foes. They can attach to passing starships, and they pose a grave danger to crews.
A typical statikete is about 20 feet long. Its body, which has heavy crystalline and metallic elements, weighs about 15 tons.
Although a statikete doesn’t function as a starship, its body and skeleton can be fitted to serve as a starship frame.

Special Abilities
Electricity Absorption (Ex)
Whenever a statikete's electricity immunity prevents it from taking damage, it regains 1 Resolve Point.
Electrical Feeder (Ex)
A statikete reduced to 0 Resolve Points loses access to its shock blast attack, and its bite attack deals half damage and deals only piercing damage.
Energy Discharge (Ex)
When a statikete scores a critical hit with its bite attack, the target and all technological objects the target holds or carries are affected as if as by the
discharge
spell. If any target is affected by this effect, the statikete regains 1 Resolve Point.
Shock Blast (Ex)
A statikete can spend 1 Resolve Point to fire its shock blast as an attack with a range increment of 120 feet.
Description
Lurking in the shadows of space, especially among debris such as the asteroids of the Diaspora, statiketes are lamprey-like creatures that drain electricity and use it to fire powerful shock blasts at foes. They can attach to passing starships, and they pose a grave danger to crews.
A typical statikete is about 20 feet long. Its body, which has heavy crystalline and metallic elements, weighs about 15 tons.
Although a statikete doesn’t function as a starship, its body and skeleton can be fitted to serve as a starship frame.
